Information Systems and Technology (English)

MENU

The Department of Information Systems and Technologies at Okan University (English), established in 2021, will continue its education process from the 2021-2022 period onwards at the Akfırat Campus. The department offers a robust computer network infrastructure, state-of-the-art computer laboratories with the latest technologies, and fully equipped classrooms.

Aiming to educate equipped and innovative individuals who can keep up with the rapidly evolving dynamics of the information world, the Department of Information Systems and Technologies at Okan University opens its doors to students with a modern educational program designed to meet the requirements of the era.

Our educational process, supported by a strong IT infrastructure, up-to-date computer laboratories, and fully equipped classrooms, offers students an environment where they can turn theoretical knowledge into practice. The program is designed considering the current trends in information technology, the expectations of the business world, and the needs of the sector, and is led by expert academicians.

From the third year onwards, students are encouraged to work on real projects, enabling them to both reinforce their theoretical knowledge and gain industry experience. We believe that our graduates will make a difference in the information sector with their analytical thinking skills, software development competencies, and knowledge of system management.

Our curriculum is designed to integrate theoretical and practical knowledge and is updated in parallel with technological developments and current requirements. Within the framework of the 'Preparation for Business Life' and 'Internship' programs, students are encouraged to complete mandatory or voluntary internships. Additionally, students have the opportunity to work part-time, along with internship opportunities both domestically and internationally.
